summary_en: 800,000 shares (4.91% of outstanding) to be acquired at up to ¥2.0B via open-market purchase from May 15, 2026 to March 24, 2027. All acquired shares to be cancelled on March 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Treasury Share Acquisition and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Meito's board resolved to acquire and cancel treasury shares under the Companies Act and the company's articles of association. The company will acquire up to 800,000 shares (4.91% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a total not exceeding ¥2.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 15, 2026 through March 24, 2027. All shares acquired under this program will be cancelled effective March 31, 2027. The acquisition is intended to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder value as part of the company's medium-term management plan MEITO CHALLENGE 2026, which prioritizes improved profitability, enhanced capital efficiency, and stable continuous shareholder returns. This follows a prior ¥1.5 billion acquisition completed in fiscal year 2026 (ended March 31, 2026).
